overall.description: A cinematic static shot of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter video game, showcasing the grand dining hall with floating candles, long wooden tables filled with students, and large stained glass windows at night. The warm candlelight illuminates the gothic stone architecture creating a magical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

events.description: a figure in white robes walks across the far end of the hall near the stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from an elevated position at the back of the hall

notable_agents.action: figure in white robes walking across the back of the hall near the stained glass windows

entered.detail: hundreds of magically suspended lit candles providing warm illumination throughout the vaulted ceiling
large gothic arched stained glass windows at the far end of the hall showing night sky
rows of long wooden house tables filled with seated students eating and conversing
gothic stone wall with iron sconces and architectural columns
gothic stone wall with hanging house banners and tapestries

segments.scene_description: A stationary cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Students sit at long wooden tables eating and conversing while a figure in white robes walks across the far end near the large stained glass windows. The warm candlelight reflects off the marble floor and stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall that maintains a constant, magical atmosphere of warmth and activity. It begins with a wide perspective of the space, where hundreds of floating candles cast a golden glow over students gathered at long wooden tables. As the candlelight reflects off the polished marble floors and stone walls, the focus extends toward the far end of the hall. The scene then settles on a figure in white robes walking gracefully across the distance, framed by the imposing presence of large stained glass windows.
